html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight

Shtick Horse is an item that can be equipped in the hand slot. When a player runs with a Shtick Horse in hand, after a few seconds they will start galloping. When a player gallops, they will slowly speed up from +15% to +60% movement speed. If a player makes a turn of more than 60 degrees in 15 frames or less, they will slip and the Shtick Horse will lose 1% of its maximum durability. To avoid this, one should turn slowly without abruptly changing their trajectory. While galloping, a player can crash into an object or creature causing the Shtick Horse to lose 2% of its maximum durability. This deals no damage to what is crashed into, however it still counts as an attack for the purposes of causing a creature to become hostile or lowering tamed Beefalo obedience.

While galloping, the player's hunger will decrease 33% faster.

Assets

  • Shtick Horse Equipped
  • Shtick Horse Used Down
  • Shtick Horse Used Up
Lunar New Year EventsTools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight
“I'm hot to trot!”
–Wilson
“Do I have to gallop?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang love to gallop.”
–Wolfgang
“Hmm. It does look kind of fun.”
–Wendy
“STRIDE AUGMENTATION DEVICE”
–WX-78
“It simply confers greater swiftness upon one's steps.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like the one I had as a kid.”
–Woodie
“But I still have to use my own legs?”
–Maxwell
“A swift charger tö ride intö battle.”
–Wigfrid
“We'll run fast as a horse!”
–Webber
“I will be quick as a horse!”
–Warly
“Make faster friend”
–Wormwood
“Makes you fast as a horse on two feet.”
–Winona
“Not a real horse, of course.”
–Wortox
“Me fastest.”
–Wurt
“That's some serious horse power!”
–Walter
“If galloping saves me time, then call me Nellie.”
–Wanda
Shtick Horse is an item that can be equipped in the hand slot. When a player runs with a Shtick Horse in hand, after a few seconds they will start galloping. When a player gallops, they will slowly speed up from +15% to +60% movement speed. If a player makes a turn of more than 60 degrees in 15 frames or less, they will slip and the Shtick Horse will lose 1% of its maximum durability. To avoid this, one should turn slowly without abruptly changing their trajectory.
While galloping, a player can crash into an object or creature causing the Shtick Horse to lose 2% of its maximum durability. This deals no damage to what is crashed into, however it still counts as an attack for the purposes of causing a creature to become hostile or lowering tamed Beefalo obedience.
While galloping, the player's hunger will decrease 33% faster.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Shtick Horse là vật phẩm có thể trang bị trong slot tay. Khi người chơi chạy với Ngựa Shtick trên tay, sau vài giây họ sẽ bắt đầu phi nước đại. Khi người chơi phi nước đại, họ sẽ từ từ tăng tốc độ di chuyển từ +15% lên +60%. Nếu người chơi quay hơn 60 độ trong 15 khung hình trở xuống, họ sẽ bị trượt và Ngựa Shtick sẽ mất 1% độ bền tối đa. Để tránh điều này, người ta nên quay chậm mà không thay đổi quỹ đạo đột ngột. Khi phi nước đại, người chơi có thể đâm vào một vật thể hoặc sinh vật khiến Ngựa Shtick mất 2% độ bền tối đa. Cái này…
